
---
title: "Web version for Simulation for Industrial Engineers"
author: "Ernesto Luis García Contreras, Ph.D."
---


![](graphics/F2COE-IME.png){#fig-famufsu width=50% fig-align="left"}                   
<div style="float:right; width:100%; text-align:right; font-style: italic; margin: 20px 0;">
<div style="text-align: left;">
[Industrial and Manufacturing Engineering (IME)](https://eng.famu.fsu.edu/ime)
</div>


> "A process cannot be understood by stopping it. Understanding must move with the flow of the process, must join it and flow with it."  
> 
> — First Law of Mentat, **Dune**, by Frank Herbert

</div>
***

## Dedication
 To *S, J, and I*,... my amazing girls.

*I love them at ten in the morning, and at eleven, and at twelve noon. I love them with all my soul and  —sometimes— on rainy afternoons.*^[ With some poetic license from a poem by Jaime Sabines: "Te quiero a las diez de la mañana, y a las once, y a las doce del día. Te quiero con toda mi alma y todo mi cuerpo, a veces, en las tardes de lluvia." ]

***

## Licensing

This work is licensed under <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/">CC BY 4.0</a><img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/cc.svg" alt="" style="max-width: 1em;max-height:1em;margin-left: .2em;"><img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/by.svg" alt="" style="max-width: 1em;max-height:1em;margin-left: .2em;">

***

## How to Navigate

Use the left-hand sidebar to explore chapters.  

Each chapter builds on previous concepts and includes figures, equations, and examples.

***

## About This Version

Companion web version for ISBN: 979-8-9959977-0-2

***

## References

See the end of each chapter for the bibliography.
